repos.name: Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
repos.desc: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.

repos.name: openai/codex-plugin-cc
repos.desc: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

repos.name: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
repos.desc: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

repos.name: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
repos.desc: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

repos.name: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
repos.desc: 337 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.

repos.name: rommapp/romm
repos.desc: A beautiful, powerful, self-hosted rom manager and player.

repos.name: ogulcancelik/herdr
repos.desc: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

repos.name: alibaba/page-agent
repos.desc: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

repos.name: harvard-edge/cs249r_book
repos.desc: Machine Learning Systems

repos.name: usestrix/strix
repos.desc: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.

repos.name: hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code
repos.desc: A hand-picked collection of the finest of resources for the most awesome of agents, Claude Code, the undisputed champion of coding companions, from the unstoppable team at Anthropic PBC. A delectable showcase of top tier skills, ambidextrous agents, scintillating status lines, top notch developer tooling, and also we have plugins

repos.name: coreyhaines31/marketingskills
repos.desc: Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

repos.name: JuliusBrussee/caveman
repos.desc: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman

repos.name: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
repos.desc: Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

repos.name: facebook/astryx
repos.desc: An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready

repos.name: immich-app/immich
repos.desc: High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

repos.name: ruvnet/RuView
repos.desc: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

repos.name: gastownhall/gastown
repos.desc: Gas Town - multi-agent workspace manager

repos.name: dotnet/skills
repos.desc: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

repos.name: OthmanAdi/planning-with-files
repos.desc: Persistent file-based planning for AI coding agents and long-running agentic tasks. Crash-proof markdown plans that survive context loss and /clear, plus a deterministic completion gate and multi-agent shared state on disk. Manus-style. Works with Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, Kiro, OpenCode and 60+ agents via the SKILL.md standard.

repos.name: steipete/CodexBar
repos.desc: Show usage stats for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code, without having to login.

repos.name: anthropics/claude-code
repos.desc: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

# 🍿 程序员今日吃瓜：meetily 爆火，Rust 又双叒叕赢了

> 📅 2026-07-06  |  🔍 共收录 22 个热门项目

早上好，各位键盘侠。今天的 GitHub Trending 告诉我们：世界各地的开发者们依然在不睡觉地写代码。以下是今日战况 ⬇️

---

## 📊 今日统计

主力语言：**Python**: 7 | **JavaScript**: 5 | **Rust**: 3 | **TypeScript**: 3 | **C#**: 2

> Python 选手：pip install 一下，问题解决了一半。另一半是版本冲突。
